arts.sum: Wimbledon's 2-0 win over Notts County at the weekend ended four games without a win. Cheltenham's 1-0 defeat to Colchester on Saturday made it four games without a win and their slim play-off chances...

arts.ttl: Johnnie Jackson delighted AFC Wimbledon squad shared goalscoring burden in Notts County win
arts.sum: “I am very pleased with Joe Lewis’ goal,” said Jackson. Defender Joe Lewis opened the scoring when he guided his header in off the far post from a corner just after the half-hour mark, before midfielder Alistair Smith fired home from the edge of the box 15 minutes later to double their lead.

arts.ttl: Preview: AFC Wimbledon vs. Cheltenham Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's League Two clash between AFC Wimbledon and Cheltenham Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
